channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘My mother refuses to turn on the heat’: Will America’s war with Iran really push up our utility bills?
item.description: “She is reading alarmist headlines about Iran in the newspapers.”

item.title: These are the hottest cybersecurity stocks in the wake of the Iran conflict
item.description: Shares of cybersecurity-software companies have been on a roll this week, with investors reacting to the heightened threat of digital warfare as the I...

item.title: Bitcoin climbs over $73,000 and touches one-month high on resilience to Iran conflict
item.description: Bitcoin must hold above $70,000 on any future pullback to build on those gains, one analyst said.

item.title: A 20% Social Security cut looms. Here’s how warning Americans could make it even worse.
item.description: New research says an education campaign could help workers, but others argue it could spark panic.

item.title: U.S. economy got off to a choppy start in 2026, the Fed finds. Here’s the good and bad news.
item.description: The U.S. grew at a slight to moderate clip early in the new year, the Federal Reserve said, but “uncertainty,” higher prices and severe winter weather...

item.title: As bond investors fret over an AI bubble, what to know — and how to find an opportunity
item.description: For the first time, investors said an AI bubble was their biggest worry, according to a recent Bank of American survey. What the pros are saying.

item.title: Broadcom earnings are out after market close. What top analysts are expecting
item.description: Analysts from firms including Morgan Stanley, UBS and JPMorgan are notably bullish on Broadcom's TPU business.

item.title: Investors say 'safest' software play Microsoft looks cheap at current prices
item.description: Two investors told CNBC's "Halftime Report" on Wednesday that they recently added to their positions in Microsoft.

item.title: U.S.-Iran attacks are putting a spotlight on drone technology. How to invest
item.description: Drones are playing a prominent role in the war between the U.S. and Iran that erupted over the weekend, putting a spotlight on the need for deterrence...

item.title: Respect price over opinion when the S&P 500 range is inside a multi-month 'trading box'
item.description: The benchmark stock index has been testing the lower boundary of its latest trading range — what Nicolas Darvas called a trading box.

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
